modinfo.title: Kliff Wears Damiane Armor
modinfo.author: Benreuveni
modinfo.description: Allows Kliff to equip Damiane-exclusive armor pieces. Designed for use with a Kliff-to-Damiane model swap mod. Replaces Damiane tribe_gender hashes with Kliff equivalents in the prefab_data_list of each Damiane armor item.
